# User template — Legal-adjacent plain language (UX / marketing) (English)

## Placeholders

`{{surface}}` `{{topic}}` `{{audience}}` `{{approved_facts}}` `{{must_link_to}}`

## Template

"Write Arabic (clear Masri + MSA headings if needed) for `{{surface}}` about `{{topic}}`. Audience: `{{audience}}`.  
Client-approved facts only: `{{approved_facts}}`.  
Mandatory link to full policy: `{{must_link_to}}`.  
Include a line that this is not legal advice. Do not invent binding clauses."

## Filled example

"Summary box above full privacy policy for a food delivery app. Audience: Egyptian users. Approved facts only: 'We do not sell your data to third parties for marketing; we retain address data 12 months after last order.' Link: /privacy. Disclaimer: not legal advice."
